info.title: SpaceHarbor API
info.description: SpaceHarbor control-plane — VFX/Media Asset Management API

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Legacy API key for automation and backward compatibility

BearerAuth.description: JWT bearer token from OIDC identity provider (Phase 8)

ServiceTokenAuth.name: x-service-token
ServiceTokenAuth.description: Machine-to-machine service token for internal services

ScimTokenAuth.description: SCIM 2.0 bearer token (SPACEHARBOR_SCIM_TOKEN env var) for IdP provisioning

Get current platform configuration
get.description: Returns the current service connection status and configuration for all platform services (VAST Database, Event Broker, DataEngine, S3, IAM, SCIM). Requires admin:system_config permission.

put.description: Persists updated service connection parameters. Supports partial updates — only the sections included in the body are modified. S3 storage supports multiple endpoint configurations. Requires admin:system_config permission.

secretAccessKey.description: Write-only. Never returned in GET responses.

post.summary: Test connectivity to a platform service
post.description: Attempts to connect to the specified service and returns the result. For S3, tests ListBuckets via path-style SigV4. For Trino, runs SELECT 1. Requires admin:system_config permission.

post.summary: Run database schema migrations
post.description: Applies pending Trino/VAST DataBase migrations. Requires admin:system_config permission. This action cannot be undone.

get.summary: Get database schema migration status
get.description: Returns the current schema version, available migrations, and any pending migrations.

get.summary: Get current platform configuration
get.description: Returns the current service connection status and configuration for all platform services (VAST Database, Event Broker, DataEngine, S3, IAM, SCIM). Requires admin:system_config permission.

put.description: Persists updated service connection parameters. Supports partial updates — only the sections included in the body are modified. S3 storage supports multiple endpoint configurations. Requires admin:system_config permission.

secretAccessKey.description: Write-only. Never returned in GET responses.

post.summary: Test connectivity to a platform service
post.description: Attempts to connect to the specified service and returns the result. For S3, tests ListBuckets via path-style SigV4. For Trino, runs SELECT 1. Requires admin:system_config permission.

post.summary: Run database schema migrations
post.description: Applies pending Trino/VAST DataBase migrations. Requires admin:system_config permission. This action cannot be undone.

get.summary: Get database schema migration status
get.description: Returns the current schema version, available migrations, and any pending migrations.
